text:
Lord of Kumbha
(Aquarius) is also Saturn (Sani). But the lord of Capricorn
(Makara) tells theProfession (Karma). That means lOth house
from Mesha (Aries) will be having the lordship of Saturn (Sani)
who is the lord of Makara (Capricorn) to perform the deeds
(Karma). when the deeds (Karma) are performed by the
influenced mind, royal planet ravi (Sun) will give gains to the
ll th lord Sani (Saturn). That means everybody should get the
right mind to do things. Then only the deed will be in order. The
way is created to perform the deed throught the right mind.
Saturn (Sani) will perform the deed. The royal planet Ravi (Sun)
will give gains to the 11 lord Saturn (Sani), after seeing the
performance. with this it will be known that 10 house from
ascendant (lagna) is house of profession and 11 house from
ascendant (Lagna) is the house of gain. Except Saturn, no other
planet will be the significator for the profession. to do the work,

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADl AS1ROLOGY 99
